title: Lungleiah District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee an ṭhu khawm
content:
330/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 29:Vawiin chawhma khan Lunglei District AIDS Prevention & Control Committee (DAPCC) chu Additional Deputy Commissioner Pi Rochuangkimi Khenglawt kaihhruaiin Lunglei DC Conference Hall-ah an ṭhu khawm a. Mission AIDS Suraksha chungchang inhrilh hriatna hun hman niin, Lunglei District dinhmun (Profile) thlir ho a ni a, District Action Plan hnuaia kumin chhunga hma lak dan tur sawi ho a ni bawk.

Member Secretary, District AIDS Control Officer Dr K. Lalhmachhuana'n thu ngaihtuah tura chhawp chhuahte a sawi zau va. DISHA Cluster Programme Manager (CPM) Dr Zodinpuii Hrahsel chuan kum 2025–2026 chhunga Lunglei District dinhmun report pein, District Sahyogi Melody Remsangpuii'n Mission AIDS Suraksha (MAS) chungchang powerpoint presentation hmangin a sawi fiah.

DISHA CPM report aṭanga a lan danin, April 2025 aṭanga March 2026 chhungin Lunglei District chhungah HIV/AIDS hrik pai hmuh chhuah thar mi 105 awmin, chu'ng zinga 67 chu mipa leh 38 chu hmeichhia an ni a; hmeichhia HIV/AIDS kai zingah hian nau pai lai 6 an tel. HIV kai thar zingah hian mipat hmeichhiatna aṭanga kai 66.67% awmin, inchiuna hriau thianghlim lo aṭanga kai 31.31% leh nu HIV kai aṭanga fate kai chhawng (vertical transmission) 2.02% an awm bawk a. HIV/AIDS kai thar zinga 84.85% lai chu kum 15 leh kum 49 inkar an ni.

He hunah hian MAS atana District Action Plan tur ruahmanna sawi ho niin, Lunglei District-a HIV/AIDS darh zel tur ven nan mahni dinhmun inhriat chian a pawimawhzia leh hemi atan hian HIV/AIDS leh Syphilis endik (test) uar a ṭul thu ngaihthlak a ni a. Kumin chhungin Red Ribbon Club awmna college pasarihah HIV/AIDS chungchang inzirtirna leh endikna (Awareness Campaign & Screening) buatsaih ni se tih niin, sawrkar pisa a tam thei ang berah HIV test kalpui ni se tih a ni a. Kumin May thlaa Healthy Lunglei District Campaign hnuaia hma lakna kalpui turah HIV endik tel ve ni se tih niin, tlawmngai pawl (NGO) hrang hrang leh kohhrante nena thawh ho dan tur rel a ni bawk.

Attachment

title: DM&R MINISTER PROF. LALNILAWMA’N “KHUAREL” APP A TLANGZARH
content:
329/2026-2027

Aizawl, the 29th April, 2026:Vawiin chawhnu khan Secretariat Conference Hall No. 1, MINECO-ah Disaster Management & Rehabilitation Department leh Buannel Geo Solutions & Services te ṭangkawp buatsaihin; Disaster Incident & Reporting Management System “Khuarel App” tlangzarhna hun hman a ni a. DM& R Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan “Khuarel App” chu a tlangzarh.

Tlangzarhna thu sawiin, DM&R Department Minister Prof. Lalnilawma chuan Khuarel chhiatna a lo thlen thula mipui mimir, DM&R leh State & District Disaster Management Authority ( SDMA& DDMA) ten rang taka chanchin an inhrilhhriat zung zung theihna leh chhiatna lam thil record data felfai taka dah ṭhat theihna tur ni nghal bawk “Khuarel App”, DM&R Department leh Buannel Geo Solutions & Services ṭangkawp ten an lo duangchhuak chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Mizoram tan thil chhinchhiah tlak tak a nih thu leh Mizoram chu India hmar chhak State te zinga hetiang App changkang tak nei hmasa ber kan nih thu a tarlang a. Minister chuan Mizoram mipui te chu he Khuarel App hman awlsam leh ṭangkai tak hi download a, hmang ṭangkaitu nih tum ṭheuh turin a chah bawk.

Vawiin programme khuhhawnna thu sawitu Pu Udit Prakash Rai, Commissioner & Secretary, DM&R pawhin Khuarel App ṭangkai tur zia sawiin, mipui ten khuarel chhiatna thleng report chu DM&R department leh DDMA te an hriattir zung zung theih bakah, DM&R Department leh DDMA lam aṭang pawhin khuarel chhiatna chungchanga mipui te hriattur pawimawhte chu he Khuarel App kaltlang hian an puang darh zung zung thei tawh dawn a ni. Hei hian Khuarel chhiatna lama hmalakna a tih chak bakah Mizoram chhunga District hrang hrangte leh Department hrang hrangte inkarah thawhhona a tichakin; a ti awlsam hle dawn a ni, a ti.

Buannel Geo Solutions & Services te chuan “Khuarel App”chu a kalhmang leh a app hman dan sawi fiahna neiin ‘Demo Presentation’ an nei bawk a, he presentation-ah hian Khuarel App hman dan tur chu kimchang zawkin tarlanna hun an nei a ni.

Pu Chuauhnuna, Director DM&R chuan lawmthu sawinain vawiin Khuarel App tlangzarhna hun chu a khar ta a ni.

Attachment

title: ZMC&H ah Scientific Session hmang
content:
328/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Scientific Forum, Zoram Medical College & Hospital (ZMC&H) leh National TB Elimination Programme (NTEP), Mizoram te tangkawpin “Scientific Session April 2026 & NTEP Sensitisation Programme” an hmang.

He hun hi Prof. Swati M Patki, Dean, ZMC&H in kaihruaiin, ZMC&H atangin Dr. Lalhmunzauvi Hnamte, Demonstrator, Department of Anatomy leh Dr. Lucy Z. Sellai, Senior Resident, Department of Otorhynolaryngology te chuan thupui an present a, NTEP, Mizoram atangin Dr. Vanzarliana, MO-STC leh Dr.J Rinkimi, TB-HIV Coordinator ten TB laka invent dan leh TB um bo tura Medical College-te tih tur sawiin hun an hmang a ni.

He programme-ah hian NTEP mi leh sa bakah ZMC&H atanga Faculty, Doctor leh intern mi thahnem tak an tel a, Mizoram State Medical Council hriatpuinain Certificate leh Credit Points pek vek an ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM GRAND CHALLENGE LAWMMAN SEMNA HUN HMAN A NI
content:
327/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29th April 2026:Vawiin chawhma khan Planning & Programme Implementation Department buatsaih Mizoram Grand Challenge hmawr bawkna leh lawmman semna hun chu Bible Society of India Auxilliary Hall, Aizawlah neih a ni a. Mizoram State Planning Board Vice Chairman, Dr Kenneth Chawngliana chuan hun a hmanpui a ni.

Dr Kenneth Chawngliana chuan India ramin kawng hrang hrangah hma a sawn zel thu leh, Mizoram pawh state dang te ruala hmalam pana a pen a pawimawh thu a sawi a. Mizoram Sawrkar pawhin ruahmanna hrang hrang a neih thu leh Thalaite thuamchak (Youth Empowerment) chu Sawrkar tum lian tak a ni a ti a. Hmasawnna tak tak thlen tur erawh chuan Sawrkar chakna ngawt a tawk lo a, mipuite nen thukhat vua a thawhho a tul thu a sawi.

Mizoram Grand Challenge hi thil thar inthlensiak (innovation competition) a ni a. Team anga tel theih niin, mi zawng zawng tana hawn a ni. Open Category leh College Category a then hran leh a ni a. Team tin te hian challenge area thlan sa 8 atangin an duh ber an thlang leh thei a. Chungte chu – Agriculture, Handloom & Handicraft Development, Tourism Development, Urban & Infrastructure, Education, Health, Environment, leh Climate Change te an ni. An area thlante an zirchian theuh hnuah a chinfel dan tur ruahmanna an siam te chu mithiam hrang hrangte hmaah phochhuakin, category tin atangin a titha zual pali theuh thlan chhuah an ni.

Mizoram Grand Challenge ah hian team 28 atangin mi 112 an tel a. March ni 19, 2025 khan Orientation leh Mentoring hun hman a ni a. April ni 28 khan team 19 ten Demo Round neiin category tina a tithate lawmman hlanna vawiinah neih a ni a. Lawmman pakhatna hian cheng nuai khat, pahnihnain cheng sing sarih, pathumnain cheng sing nga, leh palinain cheng sing thum a keng a ni.

Open Category a lawmman latute chu:1. Kut Hnathawktute Thian, Haulawng (Soil Amendment and Marketing of Ginger)2. CT Institute (Integrated Lifetime and Nutrition system)3. Mizo Farm Solutions (Establishment of post-harvest infrastructure)4. KWS (App based tracking, collection, and recycling of waste)

College Category a lawmman latute chu:1. Blue Hills, Govt. Zirtiri Residential Science College (Mizoram Digital Tourism Eco System)2. Innovisionaries, Pachhunga University College (Project Cleanest City 2030)3. The 7 Auroras, Govt. Saitual College (Progressive Web App)4. GHBC Team 1, Govt. Hrangbana College (Embracing Sustainability in Tourism)

He hunah hian Planning & Programme Implementation Department Official-te, Participant-te leh, St.Pauls Higher Secondary School naupangte an tel a. Pi B Vanlalruatin lawmthu sawiin hun a khar a ni.

title: SCHOOL EDUCATION MINISTER-IN HSSLC RESULT LAWMAWM A TIH THU A SAWI
content:
326/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th April, 2026:Vawiin khan School Education Minister Dr Vanlalthlana chuan a office chamber-ah thuchah sawiin Mizoram Board of School Education buatsaih, Higher Secondary School Leaving Certificate Examination 2026 result chhuakah zirlai exam hmachhawn mi 12,243 aṭanga za zela 87.67 laiin hlawhtlinna an chang thei leh kum hmasa aia pass percentage zaa 6.57 laia a sang chu lawmawm a tih thu a sawi.

Minister chuan kumin result chhuakah Govt Higher Secondary School zirlai pass zat chu stream hrang hrangah zaa 80 chung lam an ni thei vek tih sawiin kum hmasa lama result neih dan han thlirin zirlai pass percentage zaa 80 an la pel ngai lova, kuminah erawhchuan stream tinah an pel vek a ti a. Sorkar sikula zirtirtute leh zirlaite taimakna a lo lang chu a lawmawm a tih thu leh a chhuan thu a sawi. Candidate zawng zawng pass vekna sikul neitu zirtirtute leh zirlaite pawh a lawmpui thu a sawi bawk.

Minister chuan zirlai hlawhtlinna chang thar zawng zawngte thinlung taka a lawmpui thu leh zirna sang zawk an zir chhohnaah hlawhtlinna an chan zel theih nan duhsakna sang ber a hlan thu a sawi. Tun ṭuma hlawhtling rih lote chu beidawng mai lova nasa zawka ṭan la sauh sauh tur leh chhungkua leh ram tana hlawhtlinna sual chhuak turin anmahniah theihna duhawm tak a awm tih hre reng turin a chah a ni.

Minister chuan a hun taka result tih chhuah a nih theih nana thawktu MBSE officer leh staff te, Higher secondary school zirtirtute, zirlaite leh nu leh pate, khawtlang hruaitute leh zirna kaihhnawiha thawktute zawng zawng chungah lawm thu a sawi a. Mizoram zirnain hma a sawn zel theih nana theih tawp chhuah chhunzawm zel turin zirna kaihhnawiha thawktu zawng zawngte a sawm bawk a ni.

Dr Vanthlana chuan HSSLC pass zawng zawngte chu zirna kawngpui pengthuam atanga kal darh a lo ngai dawn ta tih sawiin mi rilru puitlingte chu he hunah hian an danglamna a lo lang thin a ti a. Kawng zawh tur thlan kawngah te leh damchhunga hnathawh tur thlan kawngah te hun pawimawh a ni tih sawiin mahni kawng zawh tur theuhah hlawhtlinna paw chhuak thei turin tan lak a ngai hle dawn a ni a ti.

Minister chuan kan ramah zirna tha a awm theih nan sorkar leh mipuite lungrual taka kan tanho a ngai a. Kutbeng rimawi siam turin kut pahnih a chet a ngai ang hian zirna kawnga hlawhtlinna nei turin sorkar leh mipuite kan tanrual a ngai a ni a ti a.  Nu leh pate chu an fate zirna ngaihsak deuh deuh tur leh Mizoram tana mi chhenfakawm chher chhuak tura theih tawp chhuah  turin a sawm a ni.

Attachment

title: MIZORAM UPA PAWL GENERAL ASSEMBLY VAWI 51-NA NEIH A NI
content:
324/2026-2027

Dated Aizawl, the 29th April 2026:Vawiin khan Vanapa Hall-ah Mizoram Upa Pawl(MUP) General Assembly (Inkhawmpui Lian) vawi 51-na neih a ni a. Social Welfare, Women & Child Development Secretary Pi Lalzarmawii chuan khualllian niin a hmanpui.

Pi Lalzarmawii chuan kum upate chu chhungkua, kohhran leh khawtlang tana an thatlai hun chhung zawng an hman thu sawiin, kan ram hmasawnna atana an thawh tawhnaah te lawmthu a sawi a. Sawrkarin Old Age Pension (Upa Pension) cheng 1000 laia a tipung thei chu lawmawm a tih thu sawiin, Ministry of Tribal Affairs hnuaia MUP General Headquarters enkawl tur Multi Service Centre Zemabawka sak mek te pawh tihpuitlin vat theih a beisei thu a sawi. Social Welfare Department hnuaia Ainawn Venga kum upate enkawlna hmun (old age home) tihchangtlun zelna tura hmalak a nih tur thu a sawi a. National Social Assistance Programme (NSAP) hnuaia Old Age Pension Central leh State atanga kan hmuh tur te chu a theih chin chin tun hnai maia pek chhuah tura hmalak mek a nih thu a sawi.

Khuallian chuan MUP ten sawrkar tha taka an lo thawhpui tawhnaah lawmthu sawiin mipui te hmasawnna tura thawhhona tha tak an neih zel a beisei thu a sawi a. Khawtlang leh ram nuam zawk kan siam theih nan kum upate tana khawvel nuam zawk siam hi mitinte mawhphurhna a nih thu a sawi.

MUP Headquarters chuan nikum 2025 bikah mi 10 hnenah kum 100 tlingte chawimawina (citation) leh lawmpuina thilpek (cheng 1000) hlan tawhin, kum 2010 atanga 2025 thleng khan he chawimawina hi mi 236 hnenah a hlan tawh a ni.

He programme-ah hian MUP Member thi ta mi 1945-te sunna hun hman a ni a. Tun dinhmunah MUP member mi 70,102 awm mekin Mizoram pawn Jampui Area, Tripura bakah Branch 13 lai a awm tawh  bawk a ni.

Attachment

title: LAWNGTLAI BAWRHSAP HOVIN SANGAUAH 'DRUG FREE DISTRICT CAMPAIGN' NEI
content:
323/2026-2027

Lawngtlai, 29th April 2026:Vawiin khan Pu Donny Lalruatsanga bawrhsap leh Chairman, Lawngtlai District Level Committee on Drug Free District- nibawk hovin BDO Conference Hall, Sangauah 'Drug Free District Campaign' neih a ni a, Pu Thomas Maratha Hlychho BDO Sangau chuan hun a kaihruai.

Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan Nasha Mukt Bharat Abhiyan-hnuaiah Ruihhlo umbo tura beihpui thlakna pawimawh tak ' Drug Free District Campaign' hawnna Lawngtlaiah neih lo nitawhin, Mizoram sawrkar pawhin 'Operation Jericho' chak takin a kalpui mek a ni, a ti a. A bik takin Sangau RD Block huamchhunga khaw hrang hrangte chu ruihhlo tihrêm kawngah tha thlah lo a, thahnem ngai taka thawk chhunzawm zel turin a sawm a. Ruihloin mimal, chhungkua, khawtlang bakah ram leh hnam a tichhiat nasat zia chhûtin, sawrkar leh VC,NGO,Kohhran bakah mipuiten tha thlah lo a thawh dun zel a pawimawh dawn hle tiin thawhpuiah a sawm a ni.

Bawrhsap chuan 'Drug Free Campaign' chu Sangau RD Block bakah Bungtlang 'S', Chawngte leh Lawngtlai RD Block - ah te neih leh ni tur a nih thu a tarlang a. Lawngtlai District- atanga ruihhlo umbo turin khaw hrang hrang an pawimawh dawn hle tih sawiin, khaw tinte mahni huamchhungah theuhah thahnem ngai taka thawk turin a fuih a. Ruihhlo awm lohna khuaa puan ngam ni thei tura chak zawka hmala turin khaw tin te a chah a. Tun atanga thahnem ngai taka ruihhlo do a nih loh chuan kan tu leh fate tan a chhenfakawm khua leh tui, ram nuam zawk siam theih a ni lo tih tarlangin, khua atlai hmaa harha ke pen thar turin khawtlang hruaitute a fuih a. Ram leh hnam himna, hmasawnna leh parchhuahna turin ruihhlo umbo a pawimawh hle tih tarlangin, Pu Donny Lalruatsanga chuan kawng hrang hranga ruihhlo do pui tur leh sawrkar lo thawhpui tlat turin kalkhawmte, Sangau RD Block hnuaia khawtlang hruaitute leh mipuite a sawm nghal bawk.

Pu Jammy Vanhmingliana SDC chuan Power Point Presentation pein, ' Drug Free District Campaign' kalpui dan leh hmalakna tur kawng hrang hrangte sawizauna a nei a. Thutkhawmah hian Ruihhlo do chak zawka kalpui dan tur, hmalak ngaihna kawng hrang hrangte leh harsatna awm thei te sawiho a ni a. Ruihhlo do kawngah theihtawpa hmalak thar chu hna hmasaah neih ni se an ti a. Tun dinhmuna sawrkar hmalakna kawng hrang hrangte fakawm an tih thu sawiin, theih ang angin sawrkar tawiawm leh thawhpui tlat ni se an ti a. Drug Free District Campaign- kaltlanga ruihhlo um bo turin, VC, YLA, Kohhran leh mipuiten theihtawp chhuah ni se an ti a bawk a ni.

Vawiin hun hmannaah hian Sangau RD Block hnuaia VC, YLA , LWA hruaitute  leh SIB - te an telkim tha hle a, Pu Thomas Maratha Hlychho chuan lawmthu sawiin hun a khar.

title: KHAWZAWLAH TB AWARENESS & SCREENING NEI
content:
322/2026-2027

Dated Khawzawl, the 29th April, 2026 :Central TB Division-in TB 100 Days Campaign Second Phase a kalpui mekah Champhai District TB Centre Staff-te chuan Khawzawl Higher Secondary School-ah vawiin khan zirlai leh zirtirtute tan TB Awareness Campaign an neihpui a, hemi hnu hian zirlai 120 leh zirtirtu 12-ten TB an vei leh vei loh endikna, X-Ray hmanga Screening an nei zui nghal a ni.

Undivided Champhai hnuaia din Champhai District TB Centre hian TB dona kawngah hma la mekin, Khawzawl District-ah pawh Chawngtlai leh Tualte khuaa School hrang hrangah Awareness leh Screening neiin khawtlang mipuite tan pawh Awareness leh Screening hi an neihpui tawh a. Khawzawl Higher Secondary School bakah Khawzawl khawchhunga Hermon vengah TB Awareness leh Screening an kalpui mek bawk.

title: Sangha Man Runpui-Community neih mekah Nghakuai Chiah lawmman sem
content:
321/2026-2027

Aizawl the 29th April, 2026:Vawiin khan Fisheries Secretary Er Lalrothanga chuan Tlabung -Khawthlang Tuipuia Sangha Man Runpui-Community Fish Harvesting ni hnihna a hmanpui a. April ni 28-a Nghakuai Chiah inelnaa tithate hnenah lawmman a sem nghal a ni.

Sangha man ni khatnaah hian sangha an man zawng zawng belhkhawm hi kg 151 a ni a. Heng mite hnenah hian lawmman hlan a ni:

1.Biggest catch of the event (Sangha man lian ber) = David Zonunsanga Mission Veng Aizawl Kg 9.720

2.Highest number of catches (Sangha man hnem ber)= F.Lalmuanpuia, Tuithiang Veng, Aizawl

3.Yuongest Angler (Sangha man kum naupang ber) = Samson Lalramdina, Salem Veng, Lunglei

4.Oldest Angler (Sangha man kum upa ber) = Lalnunsanga Varte, Mission veng, Aizawl.

Sangha man runpui hi April ni 30,2026 ah neih chhunzawm tum a ni.

Hemi ni vek hian Fisheries Secretary Er. Lalrothanga leh DFDO Lunglei te chuan Tlabung YMA runah Tlabunga sangha vulhtute leh dil neitute kawmin an harsatna te sawipuina hun a nei a. He hunah hian dil tui tling thei lo chungchang te, sangha chi tha neih dan tur kawng te, Sangha mantute tanpuina tur chungchang te, sangha chi intodelhna kawnga training pek dan tur te sawiho a ni.

Secretary chuan Tlabungah automatic water level tehna dah dan tur thlir zui a nih tur thu a sawi bawk a, hmasawn turin  farmer te rilru a pawimawh ber tiin tumruhna nei turin a fuih a ni.

Attachment

title: Ui seh chungchanga mipuite hriat tur:
content:
320/2026-2027

School naupangte tan:

1. Mi ui kan hriat ngai loh chu khawih loh tur.2. Ui tlanchhia umzui loh tur. Tlan thut lo in muangchangin kalsan tur.3. Ui mitah chiang taka en loh tur, chona emaw vauna ah an lo ngai thei.4. Ring taka au vak vak hian ui a ti phawklek a, chuvang chuan aw ki pangai in tawng tur.5.Mi ui khawih dawnin a neitute dil hmasak tur.6. Ui thil ei lai leh mu lai tihbuai loh tur.7. Ui in a zuan che chuan chiai loh tur. Ngil taka din a che tam lo thei ang bera awm tur. Hmai leh nghawng bawr kuta ven tur.8. Ui in a seh/ham che chuan puitling- nu leh pa, u te, zirtirtute hnenah hrilh vat tur.

Mipui tan:1. Ui seh hi Rabies (ui a hri) kai na tam ber a nih avangin ngaihthah tur a ni lo.2. Ui sehna pem uluk takin tui leh sahbawn in minute sawmpanga chhung silfai tur.3. Pemthar damdawi (Betadine/Dettol) hnawih tur. Thildang hnawih loh tur.4. Damdawiinah Anti-Rabies Vaccine (ARV) lak tur. Course kim a lak ngei ngei tur a ni.5. Kan ui vulh te pawh khuahkhirh a, Anti-Rabies vaccine (kum tin) Vety doctor hnen aṭangin lak tur a ni.6. Ui damlo heng: khawsik, chaw ei duhlo, chilthli tla duah duah, kawlh thut, zeng, kaih te a an awm in Vety doctor hnenah entir/hriattir tur a ni.

Issued by:National Rabies Control Programme (NRCP)National Health MissionDepartment of Health & Family Welfare

title: Pi K. Vanlalruati District Magistrate, Hnahthial District, chuan Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) chungchuangah thupek a ti chhuak.
content:
319/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 29th April, 2026:Pi K. Vanlalruati District Magistrate, Hnahthial District, chuan Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) chungchuangah thupek a ti chhuak.

ORDER

(Under Section 163 of Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023)

Mizoram hmun hrang hrangah Vawk pul hri African Swine Fever (ASF) leng te a zia awm ta deuh a hriat a ni a. Amaherawhchu, he hri hi engtik lai pawha lo leng thei reng a nih avangin, Hnahthial District chu he hri atanga kan lo him theihna turin khuahkhirhna chhuah chhunzawm a lo tul leh ta a.

Chuvangin, kei, K. VANLALRUATI, District Magistrate, Hnahthial District hian Section 163 of Bhartiya Nagarik Suraksha Sanhita, 2023 in thuneihna min pek angin a hnuaia mi ang hian thupek ka ti chhuak e:

1) Hnahthial District chhungah AH&Vety. Department emaw, mahni khua theuh Village Council/VFA/VLTF on ASF te emaw phalna leh hriatpuina tel lo chuan tumah in mahni awmna khua emaw khaw dang atangin emaw vawk/ vawksa leh vawksa atanga siam reng reng lakluh leh hralh chhuah phal a ni lo.

2) Tualchhung Vawk talh tur reng rengin Vawk hrisel tha ngei a ni tih finfiahna Veterinary Officer, Hnahthial emaw mahni khua theuha VC/VFA hnen atangin

emaw an nei ngei tur a ni.

3) Vawk damlo nei chuan a rang thei ang berin District Veterinary Hospital-ah emaw mahni khua theuha VFA /VC te hnenah emaw an report thin tur a ni.

4) Vawk thi reng reng paih mai lovin disinfectant (chinai/ bleaching powder) nen thuk taka phum tur a ni.

5) Vawk neitu ten vawk damlo an hralh/ talh tur a ni lo.

He thupek zawm lo chu Section. 223 of Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 dan hmangin hrem theih a ni ang. He thupek hian tul bik thila tihdanglam a nih lohchuan tihchhuah a nih atanga thla 2 (hnih) chhung a huam ang. He thupek hi Seal nemin Vawiin, 27th April, 2026 hian hming ka ziah hnan e.

Sd/-

K. VANLALRUATI

District Magistrate

Hnahthial District

title: Hnahthial District DDMA Chairman in Hnahthial District chhunga zirna sikul zawng zawng tan April ni 29, 2026 chu chawlhah a puang
content:
318/2026-2027

Dated Hnahthial, the 29th April, 2026 :Indian Meteorological Department [IMD) thuchhuah thar ber tarlan danin Mizoram chhung hmun hrang hrangah khawchin la hniam tura tarlan a ni a. Hnahthial District hmun hrang hrangah pawh ruah tam tham tak sur tura tarlan a nih avangin chhiatna thleng palh thei lakah zirlai naupangte an him theih nan Hnahthial District Disaster Management Authority Chairman, Pi K. Vanlalruati chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005, Section 30(v) leh Section 2(d) bakah Mizoram Sawrkar circular No.F.20016/12/2024-DMR dt.30.7.2024 in thuneihna a pek angin April ni 29, 2026 (Nilaini) hian Hnahthial District chhunga Sikul zawng zawng (Anganwadi Centre telin) tan chawlh a puang.

Thuchhuah zawm lo te chu Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 51(b) hnuaiah hrem theih an ni ang.

Attachment

title: Lunglei DDMA Chairman-in Lunglei District chhunga zirna inte tan ni 29.04.2026 (Nilaini) sikul chawlh a puang
content:
317/2026-2027

Lunglei, 2026 Ṭau thla ni 29 :Indian Meteorological Department-in khawchin thlir lawknaa a tar lan angin, Lunglei District-ah ruah sur leh thli tleh a nasat theih avangin leh chumi avanga chhiatna thleng palh thei laka zirlai naupangte an him zawk nan Lunglei District Disaster Management Authority Chairman, District Bawrhsap Pi Navneet Mann chuan Disaster Management Act, 2005 Section 30(v) & Section 34 tlawh chhanin Lunglei District huam chhunga zirna in (sikul) zawng zawngte chu vawiin April ni 29, 2026 (Nilaini) hian khar vek turin thupek a chhuah.

Attachment
